demographics.living_situation: lives independently in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is racing out of my chest, my hands are shaking uncontrollably, and I feel like I'm having a heart attack. I know I have thyroid antibodies.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on all of a sudden tonight after a really upsetting argument and it's not settling — I'm scared something is seriously wrong with my heart.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly tonight, straight after a stressful argument with someone
symptom_narrative.duration: about 30 minutes and it built up really fast
symptom_narrative.character: pounding, racing heartbeat with my hands trembling and a horrible feeling that something awful is about to happen
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it feels really intense and frightening, like I can't get on top of it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my chest is pounding and my hands won't stop shaking
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on in one big rush and has stayed since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — I keep checking my pulse and that makes me more panicked
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about my heart and the shaking makes it feel worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a bit short of breath and I keep feeling my pulse to see how fast it is
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had palpitations before but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't calm down or sit still, I'm too frightened to do anything

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: an overactive-thyroid antibody thing — I was told my thyroid blood test (the TSH one) was low but the actual hormones were normal
past_medical_history.how_managed: just monitored with blood tests, I'm not on any thyroid tablets

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the whole thing kicked off right after a heated interpersonal argument this evening; I get very anxious about my health and worry a lot about my heart

communication_style.typical_message_style: rapid, urgent messages, repeatedly asking whether it is her heart and reporting her pulse count

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch says my pulse is around 105
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single consumer-wearable reading taken during acute distress; not a clinically validated measurement and does not report rhythm

objective_data_offered.value: you can see both my hands trembling — a fine constant shake
speaking very fast, visibly panicked and restless, keeps looking at her pulse
